activities.title: Infer Todo Action
activities.description: Classify each TodoWrite item into action.kind/needsApproval WITHOUT the architecture_change keyword rule; keep push/destructive inference (DD-3)

activities.title: Evaluate Gate At Continuation
activities.description: Before re-stimulating the model into an actionable todo, check whether action.kind is in requireApprovalFor (DD-1)

activities.title: Accept Model Handback Request
activities.description: When the model sets todo status awaiting_approval, treat it as an explicit suspend request (DD-2, the key)

activities.title: Suspend Into Waiting-User
activities.description: Deterministically set workflow state=waiting_user with stopReason=approval_required:<kind>, reusing NON_RESUMABLE_WAITING_REASONS; idempotent with tool-permission gate

activities.title: Resume On User Approval
activities.description: On user approval, clear the gate (needsApproval=false / grant recorded) and allow continuation back into the gated step

activities.title: Defer Paralysis On Active Gate
activities.description: When non-progress is gate-induced (awaiting_approval head todo or non-resumable waiting_user), the paralysis detector must not nudge/halt (DD-4)
